primary_text:
Rachel Ward walked away from the supermarket supply chain after visiting a regenerative farm in Kempsey. She saw how food could be grown. She tasted the difference.

So she co-founded FarmThru. A grocery store that connects 50+ regenerative farms directly to families through a local hub.

2,000+ customers now shop with us. In July 2026, we're opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal. From $50.

This is your chance to be part of what we're building.

Not financial advice.
headline: Rachel started it. Now you can join
description: Rachel Ward co-founded FarmThru. Equity crowdfunding opens July 2026.
creative_brief: Rachel on her Kempsey farm, candid shot. Warm light. Story arc in copy, portrait in creative. Documentary tone, not promotional.
